ValidationRule.description: Payment not editable if Deposit Slip is already generated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Do_Not_Run_Payment_Validation__c = False, OR( AND(Deposit_Slip__c != null, NOT(ISCHANGED( Is_Payment_Remitted__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Remitted_Date__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Remitted_Cheque_Number__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Remitted_Date__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED( Payment_Reversed__c )) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payment not editable as Deposit Slip is already generated
